text.title: vui-accessibility-inclusivity Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-accessibility-inclusivity methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-slices
step.action: List demographic slices: accent buckets, age bands, gender, non-native flag.

step.name: collect-test-corpus
step.action: Build or source labeled corpus with adequate samples per slice (≥30 per slice).

step.name: measure-wer
step.action: Run ASR; compute per-slice WER. Compute fairness gap (best − worst).
step.decision-gate: If gap >10 pp, surface remediation plan.

step.name: audit-prompts
step.action: Compute Flesch-Kincaid per prompt. Simplify any grade >8.

step.name: verify-transcripts-fallbacks
step.action: For each voice interaction, confirm visual transcript present + non-voice fallback. Run validator.
